violations.text: Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs and raw beef tips were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as butter and chourice in the walk-in and reach-in refrigerators. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
Dough mixer was observed in close proximity to hand washing sink. Relocation or splash guard partition required. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

The cutting boards on the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -walk-in cooler fan guards -tracks, handles and doors to refrigeration units. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was observed with a steel wool scrub pad in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible and clear of sources of contamination at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Raw animal foods (such as chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as sliced onions and feta cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Raw chicken was moved to an appropriate position. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Various dessert item packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food items were moved onto shelving. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The grill drawers located in the kitchen area was observed not operating and not in good repair. Establishment is not to store TCS foods within the unit until an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below is maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The cutting boards on the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walls, prep unit surfaces, and grill top surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment and facilities shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024
